body:
Hi Amara,

I wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week and share a quick update on where [GreenPulse](greenpulse-io) is headed into Q1. We've just closed out our pilot with two municipal utility partners and the early grid-edge data is genuinely exceeding what we projected — retention and usage patterns both look strong. I know you mentioned [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) has been looking closely at the intersection of AI and grid infrastructure, and I think this traction positions us well for that conversation. We're planning to open a seed round in late January and I'd love to get your read on the numbers before we finalize terms. Would you have 30 minutes in the first or second week of the new year?

Best,
Dev
